creator: dgilbert@daveg.ca
text:
The laptop has two headphone ports.  They're both live --- but the speakers
don't switch out when the headphones are in use.  I see a lot of commits
to hdac.c talking about other laptops that require some software to
switch to headphones.  This one does as well.

Fix: 

I don't know how this is fixed.
How-To-Repeat: Boot Dell XPS-1730, plug in earphones, play sounds.  Sounds still come
from speakers.
